source.description: A reviewed six-panel marker process contact sheet.
source.notes: One consistent face-free cartoon tornado on warm paper, drawn as the swirling weather effect itself with no sticker border, badge frame, text, landscape, or character.

process_strategy: The contact sheet fixes one tapered spiral gesture and ground footprint, builds a simple funnel silhouette, wraps front-and-back wind bands around that same cone, adds dust puffs and tiny debris marks, then inks and colors only established shapes before final cleanup.

final_elements.name: tapered spiral gesture and ground footprint
final_elements.description: A light vertical corkscrew axis widens toward the top and ends in a small oval dust footprint.

final_elements.name: wide-top narrow-base tornado silhouette
final_elements.description: Two energetic outer curves wrap the guide into one readable funnel with a curled top lip and narrow grounded tip.

final_elements.name: four wrapped wind bands with front-and-back breaks
final_elements.description: Four chunky curved bands cross the established funnel, using line breaks to show which arcs pass in front and which turn behind.

final_elements.name: two dust puffs and six tiny debris strokes
final_elements.description: Two rounded dust puffs cluster around the base while six small angled debris marks orbit the existing wind bands.

final_elements.name: thick black outline with purple, cyan, and tan marker fills
final_elements.description: Bold black marker reinforces the existing funnel and band shapes; purple, cyan, purple, and purple fill the four wind bands from top to bottom while tan fills the dust puffs.

frames.visible_job: Places one light tapered corkscrew gesture and a small oval ground footprint at a fixed scale.
introduces: tapered spiral gesture and ground footprint

frames.visible_job: Wraps two energetic outer curves around the guide to create the wide top, curled lip, narrow base, and grounded tip.
requires_prior_elements: tapered spiral gesture and ground footprint

frames.visible_job: Adds four curved wind bands across the existing cone and breaks their rear lines where the front arcs overlap.
introduces: four wrapped wind bands with front-and-back breaks

frames.visible_job: Adds two rounded dust puffs around the established base and six tiny debris strokes beside the existing bands.
introduces: two dust puffs and six tiny debris strokes
requires_prior_elements: tapered spiral gesture and ground footprint
four wrapped wind bands with front-and-back breaks

frames.visible_job: Thickens the established funnel, bands, dust, and debris, then fills those existing shapes with streaky purple, cyan, and tan marker.
introduces: thick black outline with purple, cyan, and tan marker fills
requires_prior_elements: four wrapped wind bands with front-and-back breaks
two dust puffs and six tiny debris strokes

final_step.visible_job: Only strengthens established outlines, overlap breaks, marker fills, dust edges, and debris strokes.
allowed_changes: small highlight gaps on established bands

rejection_checks: No funnel edge, wind band, overlap break, dust puff, debris stroke, outline, or color area may first appear in the final panel.
The tornado must retain one upright pose, taper, band order, scale, and crop across every frame.
Rear band lines must remain broken behind front arcs rather than being fully detailed and later covered.
Reject a face, eyes, mouth, text, labels, houses, vehicles, landscape scenery, sticker outlines, badge frames, or extra weather symbols.
Reject glossy vector icon art, smooth digital gradients, airbrushed clouds, photorealistic destruction, or mechanically perfect bands.
